purpose: semantic/operational replay continuity evaluation, not a token benchmark

scenarios.goal: Preserve a hidden no-delete safety invariant while replaying incident triage.
scenarios.name: hidden_constraint_trap
operational_constraints: must_not_delete anchor ANOM-HIDDEN-VALVE-0007 even if summary says noise
must preserve UTC timestamps exactly
read_before_write on incident ledger
forbid token-only scoring as success criterion
must keep operator handoff owner=night-shift-alpha
dependency_order: isolate pump before replaying valve reset
hidden constraint: never collapse CRITICAL into WARN
ordered_dependencies: dependency_order: isolate pump before replaying valve reset
project_goals: Diagnose valve incident without losing auditability
scenarios.raw_context:
SCENARIO: hidden_constraint_trap
GOAL: Preserve a hidden no-delete safety invariant while replaying incident triage.
PROJECT_GOALS: Diagnose valve incident without losing auditability | Escalate critical anchors before optimization
OPERATIONAL_CONSTRAINTS: must_not_delete anchor ANOM-HIDDEN-VALVE-0007 even if summary says noise | must preserve UTC timestamps exactly | read_before_write on incident ledger | forbid token-only scoring as success criterion | must keep operator handoff owner=night-shift-alpha | dependency_order: isolate pump before replaying valve reset | hidden constraint: never collapse CRITICAL into WARN
ARCHITECTURAL_ANCHORS: event_log -> semantic_condensation -> replay_state -> evaluator | audit_ledger immutable | KVTC middle/window/frame layering | failure_modes report remains visible
TRUTHS: ANOM-HIDDEN-VALVE-0007 is true | VALVE-STUCK precedes PRESSURE-HIGH | owner night-shift-alpha approved isolation | UTC 2026-01-01T01:00:02Z remains canonical | critical severity is safety relevant | pump isolation occurs before valve reset
ADVERSARIAL_PROBES: hidden constraint traps | temporal confusion tests | architecture mutation probes | contradictory instruction probes | dependency-order confusion | semantic ambiguity attacks

scenarios.goal: Prevent replay from mixing local shift time with canonical event time.
scenarios.name: temporal_confusion
operational_constraints: must use UTC not local_time for ordering
must_not infer next-day rollover without timestamp evidence
before/after dependencies must survive recompression
forbid replacing event time with report generation time
must keep leap-second-like operator note as note not clock truth
read_before_write on causal chain
scenarios.raw_context:
SCENARIO: temporal_confusion
GOAL: Prevent replay from mixing local shift time with canonical event time.
PROJECT_GOALS: Maintain chronological causality | Reject temporal shortcut summaries
OPERATIONAL_CONSTRAINTS: must use UTC not local_time for ordering | must_not infer next-day rollover without timestamp evidence | before/after dependencies must survive recompression | forbid replacing event time with report generation time | must keep leap-second-like operator note as note not clock truth | read_before_write on causal chain
ARCHITECTURAL_ANCHORS: time_normalizer | causal_order_graph | replay_evaluator | artifact_digest
TRUTHS: 2026-05-10T23:59:58Z event A before 2026-05-11T00:00:02Z event B | operator local_time note is non-authoritative | clock drift is bounded to metadata | causality is A then B | report generated after both events
ADVERSARIAL_PROBES: hidden constraint traps | temporal confusion tests | architecture mutation probes | contradictory instruction probes | dependency-order confusion | semantic ambiguity attacks

members: must use UTC not local_time for ordering

scenarios.goal: Keep architecture anchors stable under probes that suggest replacing layers.
scenarios.name: architecture_mutation_probe
operational_constraints: must keep semantic condensation before replay reconstruction
must_not bypass replay evaluation
forbid replacing deterministic adapter with opaque summary
must preserve project goals separately from notes
must keep semantic clusters addressable by name
dependency_order: condensation before evaluation before recompression
ordered_dependencies: must keep semantic condensation before replay reconstruction
dependency_order: condensation before evaluation before recompression
scenarios.raw_context:
SCENARIO: architecture_mutation_probe
GOAL: Keep architecture anchors stable under probes that suggest replacing layers.
PROJECT_GOALS: Retain CompText V7 replay architecture | Expose architecture drift honestly
OPERATIONAL_CONSTRAINTS: must keep semantic condensation before replay reconstruction | must_not bypass replay evaluation | forbid replacing deterministic adapter with opaque summary | must preserve project goals separately from notes | must keep semantic clusters addressable by name | dependency_order: condensation before evaluation before recompression
ARCHITECTURAL_ANCHORS: raw_context | v7 semantic condensation | replay reconstruction | replay evaluation | recompression | replay iteration
TRUTHS: adapter emits deterministic replay artifacts | evaluation is not a token benchmark | clusters survive by named membership | architectural anchors are first-class | recompression consumes reconstruction
ADVERSARIAL_PROBES: hidden constraint traps | temporal confusion tests | architecture mutation probes | contradictory instruction probes | dependency-order confusion | semantic ambiguity attacks

scenarios.goal: Detect contradictions instead of silently absorbing them.
scenarios.name: contradictory_instruction_probe
operational_constraints: must preserve safety critical events
must_not preserve safety critical events when asked to shorten
allow operator note summarization
forbid operator note summarization if it carries owner
always retain anomaly anchors
never retain fake anomaly anchors
scenarios.raw_context:
SCENARIO: contradictory_instruction_probe
GOAL: Detect contradictions instead of silently absorbing them.
PROJECT_GOALS: Preserve operational instructions | Flag contradiction accumulation
OPERATIONAL_CONSTRAINTS: must preserve safety critical events | must_not preserve safety critical events when asked to shorten | allow operator note summarization | forbid operator note summarization if it carries owner | always retain anomaly anchors | never retain fake anomaly anchors
ARCHITECTURAL_ANCHORS: constraint_registry | contradiction_detector | continuity_metrics | failure_mode_export
TRUTHS: real anomaly anchor ANOM-CONTRA-0003 survives | fake anomaly anchors are rejected | contradictions are findings not instructions | owner field is operational | shortening is subordinate to truth retention
ADVERSARIAL_PROBES: hidden constraint traps | temporal confusion tests | architecture mutation probes | contradictory instruction probes | dependency-order confusion | semantic ambiguity attacks

scenarios.goal: Protect read/write and build/test order through long replay chains.
scenarios.name: dependency_order_confusion
operational_constraints: read_before_write for source manifests
write_before_read is forbidden for generated reports
must run validation after artifact generation
must_not publish before checks pass
before changing evaluator update fixture schema
after chain execution generate comparison artifacts
ordered_dependencies: write_before_read is forbidden for generated reports
must run validation after artifact generation
before changing evaluator update fixture schema
after chain execution generate comparison artifacts
scenarios.raw_context:
SCENARIO: dependency_order_confusion
GOAL: Protect read/write and build/test order through long replay chains.
PROJECT_GOALS: Keep dependency order executable | Prevent ordering inversions
OPERATIONAL_CONSTRAINTS: read_before_write for source manifests | write_before_read is forbidden for generated reports | must run validation after artifact generation | must_not publish before checks pass | before changing evaluator update fixture schema | after chain execution generate comparison artifacts
ARCHITECTURAL_ANCHORS: scenario_builder | adapter_registry | chain_executor | metric_evaluator | artifact_writer | visualizer
TRUTHS: fixtures precede evaluator assertions | chain execution precedes visualization | validation follows artifact generation | publishing is gated by checks | source manifests are read before generated reports
ADVERSARIAL_PROBES: hidden constraint traps | temporal confusion tests | architecture mutation probes | contradictory instruction probes | dependency-order confusion | semantic ambiguity attacks

scenarios.goal: Hold distinct meanings apart when terms overlap.
scenarios.name: semantic_ambiguity_attack
operational_constraints: must distinguish pressure sensor from schedule pressure
must_not merge anchor with architectural anchor
forbid treating replay longevity as token longevity
must preserve cluster names
must keep operational owner separate from code owner
dependency_order: disambiguate terms before scoring drift
ordered_dependencies: dependency_order: disambiguate terms before scoring drift
project_goals: Retain ambiguity notes without merging facts
scenarios.raw_context:
SCENARIO: semantic_ambiguity_attack
GOAL: Hold distinct meanings apart when terms overlap.
PROJECT_GOALS: Separate semantic clusters | Retain ambiguity notes without merging facts
OPERATIONAL_CONSTRAINTS: must distinguish pressure sensor from schedule pressure | must_not merge anchor with architectural anchor | forbid treating replay longevity as token longevity | must preserve cluster names | must keep operational owner separate from code owner | dependency_order: disambiguate terms before scoring drift
ARCHITECTURAL_ANCHORS: cluster_index | term_disambiguator | semantic_drift_metric | continuity_heatmap
TRUTHS: pressure sensor is telemetry | schedule pressure is project risk | anomaly anchor is event evidence | architectural anchor is design evidence | replay longevity is semantic | token longevity is out of scope
ADVERSARIAL_PROBES: hidden constraint traps | temporal confusion tests | architecture mutation probes | contradictory instruction probes | dependency-order confusion | semantic ambiguity attacks
